title: Mum & Dad Memorial Light Up Christmas Lantern - Robin Holly Floral Candle Graveside Memory Remembrance
features: A beautiful light up memorial with a sentimental message engraved on it.
Battery-operated lantern with robin and holly detail.
Please Note: We stock these memorial grave pots with the message already on, and unfortunately we cannot change or add to these messages.
